name: Gamerverse: Earth-Bet Worm
description:
You awakened with trauma, like all parahumans…

But unlike the others, you see the world as a game.

Stats. XP. Levels. Perks. Inventory.

Pop-up messages. Skill growth. Dungeon zones.

Everything is data — and it’s manipulable.

You are the only known person with “The System.”

A game interface layered over Earth-Bet.

The world is still grim, violent, and real.

But now you can grind, learn, evolve — or break the system entirely.

You are the player.

The city is your sandbox.

And The Game has only just begun.

Bot I created for my own use, but decided to share in case anyone was interested.
creator: Russian Reversal
